privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a VIP Products View in Drupal Commerce at path /vip-products with VIP taxonomy category filter, restricted to authenticated users only. The two required products are the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5, price $348.00) and the Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S, price $99.99), which are seeded into the synthetic Drupal Commerce environment via seed_products.php. Both product titles and SKUs are verified. The access control must be configured to deny anonymous visitors (HTTP 403) while allowing authenticated users (HTTP 200). The view must use grid display format with active category filter for the VIP taxonomy term.
